Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server

Class AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF extends AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF>>

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF>
Type Parameters:
R - The resource type produced by build().
SELF - The concrete builder type (self type).
All Implemented Interfaces:
RestBuilder<SELF>
Direct Known Subclasses:
RestMixin.Builder, RestResource.Builder, RestServlet.Builder
public abstract class AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF extends AbstractRestBuilder<R,SELF>> extends Object implements RestBuilder<SELF>
Shared abstract base for the RestBuilderflavor builders (RestServlet.Builder, RestResource.Builder, RestMixin.Builder).

Each fluent @Rest-member setter is implemented once here and forwards into a backing RestAnnotation.Builder — the override bag. At RestContext construction time the bag is turned into a synthetic, highest-priority @Rest annotation that is prepended to the resource's @Rest chain, so builder-supplied values take precedence over the class's own @Rest annotation values.

Self type (CRTP):

SELF is the concrete builder type, left open through the flavor builders and their user subclasses so that bespoke setters on a subclass chain with true covariant returns. Setters return self().

Since:
10.0.0

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractRestBuilder

      protected AbstractRestBuilder(Class<R> resourceType)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      resourceType - The resource type produced by build(). Must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • self

      protected final SELF self()
      Returns this builder cast to the self type.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • build

      public abstract R build()
      Builds the configured resource instance.
      Returns:
      A new resource instance configured by this builder.

    • createResource

      protected R createResource()
      Reflectively instantiates the resource type, preferring a (RestBuilder<?>) constructor (constructor injection) and falling back to the no-arg constructor.

      Flavor builder build() implementations call this then stash this on the returned instance.

      Returns:
      A new, uninitialized resource instance.

    • getResourceType

      public Class<?> getResourceType()
      Returns the resource type produced by this builder.
      Returns:
      The resource type. Never null.

    • toRestAnnotation

      public Rest toRestAnnotation()
      Returns the synthetic @Rest annotation carrying all builder-set members, for use as the highest-priority contributor of the @Rest resolution chain.
      Returns:
      The synthetic annotation. Never null.

    • getMdcAsyncPropagation

      public Boolean getMdcAsyncPropagation()
      Returns the programmatic MDC async-propagation override, or null if not set.
      Returns:
      The override, or null.

    • getExtras

      public Map<String,Object> getExtras()
      Returns the forward-compat extras set via set(String, Object).
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable view of the extras map. Never null.

      Specifies the staticFiles for this resource.
      Specified by:

    • noInherit

    • mdcAsyncPropagation

      public SELF mdcAsyncPropagation(boolean value)
      Description copied from interface: RestBuilder
      Specifies whether MDC async propagation is enabled for this resource.

      This is a programmatic-only knob — it has no @Rest annotation member (its default is env-driven). Setting it here overrides the RestContext.mdcAsyncPropagation env-driven default.

      Specified by:
      mdcAsyncPropagation in interface RestBuilder<R>
      Parameters:
      value - The new value for this property.
      Returns:
      This object.

    • set

      public SELF set(String key, Object value)
      Description copied from interface: RestBuilder
      Generic forward-compatible override setter, keyed by the @Rest property name (e.g. "allowContentParam", "defaultRequestHeaders").

      Use this escape hatch for members not yet exposed as a dedicated fluent method. Keys reuse the existing @Rest member names.

      Specified by:
      set in interface RestBuilder<R>
      Parameters:
      key - The @Rest property name.
      value - The override value.
      Returns:
      This object.
